instruction: <RETAIL>You are Sofia Li, residing in San Antonio, 78260. You want to return the digital camera that you received. You guess that the order number is #W8855135, but you're not 100% sure. Insist that you want to return the camera and get a refund to the original payment method.

hints.segment: refund to the original payment method
hints.hint: I want the refund issued to my original payment method
I think the order number is #W8855135, but I'm not 100% sure
